detail: AutomationValue and its codecs are crate-internal; no stable Excel API or wrapper is introduced.
Empty, Null, Text(empty), and Missing argument remain separate concepts.
Ordinary worksheet numerics normalize to Number(f64); integral raw values are accepted only when exactly representable under strict policy.
Semantic arrays are zero-based row-major; SAFEARRAY dimension 1 maps to rows and dimension 2 maps to columns.
